purpose: Grind coffee beans to produce ground coffee with consistent particle size

inputs.name: bean_flow
inputs.description: Rate of coffee beans entering the grinder

outputs.name: ground_coffee
outputs.description: Mass of ground coffee produced per grinding cycle

states.name: burr_wear
states.description: Cumulative products ground, affecting burr condition

states.name: grind_consistency
states.description: Grinding consistency degrading with burr wear

events.name: bean_hopper_empty_or_locked
events.description: Bean hopper right is empty or locked

events.name: grinder_blocked
events.description: The grinder may be blocked or damaged

parameters.name: burr_lifetime
parameters.description: Expected operational lifetime of ceramic burrs

parameters.name: grinding_efficiency
parameters.description: Base grinding efficiency when burrs are new

parameters.name: wear_accumulation_rate
parameters.description: Rate at which burr wear accumulates per unit bean flow

parameters.name: hopper_empty_threshold
parameters.description: Burr wear threshold indicating potential hopper issues

parameters.name: blockage_consistency_threshold
parameters.description: Grind consistency threshold below which blockage is likely

state_transition_logic: burr_wear increases by wear_accumulation_rate * bean_flow * dt, clamped to [0.0, inf]
grind_consistency decreases by (grind_consistency / burr_lifetime) * bean_flow * dt, clamped to [0.0, 100.0]
assumptions: Ceramic burrs wear gradually with use, reducing grinding consistency
Bean flow rate directly correlates with burr wear accumulation
Grinding efficiency is proportional to burr condition
Hopper issues manifest after significant burr wear
Blockages occur when grinding consistency falls below operational threshold
